bpms_structure_identity.sub_classification: Ambient Contamination Matrix / Autonomous Degradation Engine

fallout_propagation_radius.trigger: Any [Holon] or [Chimera] triggers an action exceeding the Joule Alpha-Threshold.
fallout_propagation_radius.execution: Spawn an expanding topological sphere. Calculate Radiation Level (R_L) based on kinetic intensity of the source event. Apply Inverse Square Law for energy decay over distance.
fallout_propagation_radius.result: Leaves a lingering, invisible environmental footprint after violence.

kinetic_scar_degradation.execution: Execute thermodynamic bit-rot. Delete topological variables. Erode structural integrity.
kinetic_scar_degradation.result: Destroys data too close to the blast; acts as severe environmental damage to the OPC.

mutagenic_lottery_warping.execution: Execute blind geometric scrambling. Reassign structural tags. Splice random data vectors.
mutagenic_lottery_warping.result: Spawns incredibly rare, highly distorted ['Irradiated'] sub-elements for the Sovereign to scavenge.

lingering_hazard_topography.execution: Update local Map sector with Contamination Tag. Hot zones damage/mutate anyone passing through until the energy naturally subducts.
lingering_hazard_topography.result: Forces tactical pathfinding. The Sovereign must map their own collateral damage.

contamination_execution_loop.step_2_seed_fallout: Paint the local Map with [R_L] data sphere.
contamination_execution_loop.step_3_irradiate: Sweep all enclosed elements (Neutral, Feral, Sovereign).
contamination_execution_loop.step_4_warp_or_burn: Apply Mutation Math based on depth inside the hot-zone.
contamination_execution_loop.step_5_hazard_decay: Slowly cool the quadrant over prolonged cyclic inactivity.

fields.sector_monitored: Coordinate location of the blast zone.
fields.ambient_contamination_level: Percentage intensity of the lingering Joule-fallout.
fields.blast_provenance: The historical action that caused the radiation.
fields.observed_mutagenesis: Status update on ambient logic caught in the crossfire.
fields.sovereign_hazard_warning: Immediate tactical threat to the OPC's own structural integrity if it remains in the zone.
